calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeannette Fisher-Kouadio for Christine Burnette.

The Court asked counsel to address the $12,000.00 shortfall. Ms. Fisher-Kouadio stated that she prepared a calculation, presented a copy to the court and went through each line item and stated that the examiner did not have the bond premium, probate referee costs or the mortgage payment. The Court stated that it will talk to the examiner and asked if there were any additional receipts. Ms. Fisher-Kouadio stated that subsequent to this filing, on June 15, 2015 Chase reimbursed unclaimed funds in excess of $3,000.00 and that it will be distributed as specified in the order. The Court took the accounting petition under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not Reported)
